series_metadata.series_description: Correspondence of the head of an agency dealing with significant aspects of the administration of their offices. Correspondence includes information concerning agency policies, procedures, program, fiscal and personnel matters.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 2 years, then copy for permanent retention. Then review by State Archives prior to disposal. ; Paper: Retai paper 2 years, then scan to electronic form for permanent retention.Then review by State Archives prior to disposal., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Trash
